TCA-IRR
    Back to Analysis Setup

    Economic Analysis Configuration

    Configure sub-dimension weights and thresholds for the Economic Analysis module.

    Sub-Dimension Weights
    Weights must sum to 1.0. Current total: 1.00
    30%

    Competitiveness of the sector, barriers to entry, and consolidation dynamics.

    25%

    Ability to raise prices without losing significant market share.

    25%

    Alignment of macro-economic trends (GDP, rates, inflation) with the business model.

    20%

    Resistance to economic downturns, cyclicality, and recessionary pressures.

    Scoring Formula
    economic_score = industry_structure × w₁ + pricing_power × w₂ + macro_indicators × w₃ + cycle_resilience × w₄
    industry_structure× 0.30
    pricing_power× 0.25
    macro_indicators× 0.25
    cycle_resilience× 0.20
    Total weight1.00
    Module Settings
    8
    5.5
    Signal Definitions
    Green — Score ≥ 8: Favourable economic context.
    Yellow — Score ≥ 5.5: Moderate economic risk.
    Red — Score < 5.5: Adverse economic conditions.
